param_values_discovered.qType: string 'STARRED' or 'UNSTARRED' (column qtype); NOT a numeric code
param_values_discovered.lsno: not used for Rajya Sabha; the real key is ses_no (RS session number)

access.how_found: Mined /rs/_next/static/chunks; the itemWise/question api_rs endpoints only return daily consolidated-PDF lists. Chunk questions-and-answers-b24eb989f71d460e.js revealed the ACTUAL per-question backend is a different host: rsdoc.nic.in/Question/Search_Questions?whereclause=... a raw parametrised query supporting ses_no, qtype, qno, min_code, mp_code, adate, and qtitle LIKE '%keyword%'. Answer PDFs come back in the JSON 'files' field as sansad.in/getFile/annex/<ses>/<file>.pdf. Confirmed live over curl. (Chrome extension was not connected, so discovery was done via curl on the JS chunks rather than live network capture.)

failures.result: HTTP 404 (guessed values; lsno concept does not apply to RS)
HTTP 404 - no such route under api_rs; RS has no keyword-search API mirroring Lok Sabha
HTTP 200 but returns only consolidated daily-PDF list per session, NOT individual questions - dead end for per-question retrieval

state_wise_tables.note: Full table lists all 32 states/UTs + 'State Not Indicated'; abridged here to major recipients + Bihar (specifically asked) + totals. Complete figures in txt/ses268_Q686.txt lines 45-89.

state_wise_tables.unit: USD million (FDI equity inflow), with cumulative

state_wise_tables.source_ques: RS US Q201 (21.07.2023) - Andhra Pradesh only

sector_tables.note: Full 58-sector table (identical figures in Q214 and Q1801). Complete list in txt/ses262_Q214.txt lines ~70-200 and txt/ses260_Q1801.txt lines 269-388.
Q3908 gives FY19-20..23-24; Q2487 gives FY20-21..24-25 (adds 540.76 for 2024-25) plus Rs-crore column.

Same answer also gives %foreign shareholding in 12 PSBs as on 31.03.2025 (SBI 11.07, Canara 10.55, BoB 9.43, Union 7.48, PNB 5.85, Indian 4.74, BoI 3.89, BoMah 1.93, Central 1.27, P&Sind 0.76, IOB 0.27, UCO 0.06).

sector_tables.source_ques: RS US Q214/Q1801 sub-tables & national totals
sector_tables.unit: USD billion (Total FDI inflow / outflow / net) - from Q3874
sector_tables.note: Q3874 (27.03.2026). Country-wise inflow (Annexure-I) & ODI outflow (Annexure-II) hosted on DPIIT: https://www.dpiit.gov.in/static/uploads/2026/03/853914722138eb961f000127c419f710.pdf

sector_tables.source_ques: RS US Q1647 (13.02.2026) - national FDI equity

press_note_3.source_ques: RS US Q3877 (27.03.2026) - Norms for FDI from bordering countries
press_note_3.disclosure: PN 3/2020 (17.04.2020): investments from countries sharing land border with India (LBC) require Government approval (not prohibited). NEW: Press Note 2 of 2026 dated 15.03.2026 (PN 2/2026) - provides definition/criteria for Beneficial Owner under PML Rules 2005; investors with non-controlling LBC ownership up to 10% permitted under automatic route (per sectoral caps), subject to reporting to DPIIT; LBC proposals in specified sectors to be decided within 60 days. No approval/rejection counts or named applicants disclosed.

press_note_3.source_ques: RS STARRED Q238 (21.03.2025) - Amendment in FDI policy
press_note_3.disclosure: Confirms PN 3/2020 (17.04.2020) land-border approval requirement; states 'Subsequent to PN 3/2020, no amendment has been undertaken' (as of Mar 2025); 6-month non-extendable Business Visa introduced 26.07.2024 for PLI-scheme foreign nationals (not nationality-specific). No China-specific relaxation. No applicant names/approval statistics.

press_note_3.source_ques: RS US Q3238 (28.03.2025) - FDI inflows and security concerns
press_note_3.disclosure: FDI prohibited in Atomic Energy, Railway operations, Real estate, Gambling/betting. Broadcasting, Telecom, Defence, Satellites, Private Security require security clearance. Manufacturing FDI equity rose USD 97.69bn (2004-14) to USD 165.09bn (2014-24). No PN3 approval/rejection data.

refusals.quote: data on country-wise and sector-wise net FDI inflows is not maintained.
Data is not maintained in such a segregated manner. (re: youth employment in heavy-industries/manufacturing 2018-2023)
the data relating to project investment through Public-Private Partnership (PPP) is not captured centrally.

refusals.source_ques: Recurring caveat across Commerce/Finance FDI answers
refusals.quote: Sector/State/Country-wise details are maintained only for equity component of FDI inflow. (i.e. total FDI incl. reinvested earnings & other capital is NOT broken down by state/sector/country)

unavailable: Greenfield-vs-brownfield/M&A split of FDI: NOT found in any Rajya Sabha FDI answer 2023-2026. 'Greenfield' questions in this period are all about greenfield AIRPORTS/HIGHWAYS/industrial-cities (infrastructure), not the RBI greenfield-vs-acquisition FDI classification. Government does not report this split via RS PQs.
Press Note 3 approval/rejection counts and named applicant companies: never disclosed - answers restate the policy only.
Country-wise FDI inflow tables for 2023-2026: referenced (Q3874) but hosted off-site on DPIIT PDF, not transcribed into the RS answer body.
Rajya Sabha has NO keyword-search JSON API equivalent to Lok Sabha's api_ls/question/qetFilteredQuestionsAns; retrieval requires the rsdoc.nic.in/Question/Search_Questions SQL-whereclause backend.
